name: architect
description: >- Given a PRD, produces an implementation architecture: file tree, component breakdown, data model, and a phased build plan with end conditions that Archon can execute directly. Multi-candidate evaluation for key decisions.
author: SethGammon
summary_zh: 它能将产品需求文档转化为可执行的开发方案，不仅为关键决策提供多方案评估，还能生成AI代理可直接落地的分步计划，适合需要从需求快速跨越到代码实现的项目前期。
